name: Glyph of Warding

components.material: powdered diamond worth 200+ GP, which the spell consumes

description: You inscribe a glyph on a surface or object that triggers on a condition you set, unleashing either a stored spell (level 3 or lower) or an Explosive Runes burst (5d8 of a chosen energy type, DEX save for half in a 20-foot Sphere). Engine: a placed ward / trap is descriptive only until the player-authored trap pipeline lands.
